feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman reached Vermilion City through the Underground Path route from Cerulean.

feed.speaker: Misty
feed.text: Misty scouted Vermilion harbor and found cargo traffic matching the stolen TM resale route.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill flagged an S.S. Anne ticket lead connected to passenger manifests and unusual storage-network pings.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red spotted unstable gym power readings near Lt. Surge's district. Rocket may be testing a sabotage route.
